title: Bingham Farms Duck Wrapped Rawhide Twist Dog Treat - Dental Chew, Nutritious, Natural Flavour, High Protein – Small - 8 pk - 80 g (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
ideal FOR STRONG CHEWERS: A tasty treat which lasts filled with vitamins, minerals and goodness giving the treats a ideal taste that your dog will love
NATURAL FLAVOUR: No artificial colours or flavours
HIGH PROTEIN: Made with 20 Percent real duck breast meat wrapped around a tasty rawhide twist
IDEAL: Vitamins, minerals and goodness locked in giving a ideal taste that your dog will love
DELICIOUS and NUTRITIOUS: Free from grain and promotes dental health
